title: Villager Bed
description: Adds a Villager Bed that spawns in villages and can only be used by villagers, preventing players from sleeping in village beds.
body:
Villager Bed adds a special bed that generates in villages and can only be used by villagers.

Players cannot sleep in these beds, preventing early-game players from immediately claiming village beds while keeping normal villager behavior intact.

Features:
- Villager-only beds
- Automatic replacement of village beds during world generation
- Villagers still claim and sleep in the bed normally
- Custom hay-style texture to distinguish it from player beds
- Config option to control which beds are replaced

Config options:
- VANILLA_ONLY – replace only vanilla beds
- ALL_BEDS – replace any bed found in structures
- NONE – disable structure replacement
